channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large Amount of Rubbish Dumped on Path, 27th April
item.description:
A large amount of rubbish (including a mouldy mattress) has been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ancona Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Fridge-Freezer Dumped on Pavement, 27th April
item.description:
An unwanted fridge-freezer has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 80. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of Rubbish and Unwanted Heater Dumped on Pavement, 27th April
item.description:
Several bags of rubbish and an unwanted heater have been left dumped on the pavement outside number 106. Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Fencing Dumped on Pavement, 27th April
item.description:
A pile of unwanted fencing has been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glyndon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Furniture Dumped on Turfed Area, 27th April
item.description:
An item of broken furniture(?) has been left dumped on the turfed area (behind an abandoned Blue-Top wheelie bin). Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glyndon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple Items of Rubbish Dumped on Pavement, 27th April
item.description:
Multiple items of rubbish have been left dumped on the pavement outside number 75/75a. Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waverley Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish Dumped and Large Tree Branch Obstructing Pavement, 27th April
item.description:
Rubbish has been dumped on the pavement and a large tree branch is obstructing the pavement. Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Majendie Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Furniture Dumped on Pavement, 27th April
item.description:
An item of unwanted furniture has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 46. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Majendie Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Metal Frame Dumped on Pavement, 27th April
item.description:
An unwanted rusty metal frame has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 50. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Majendie Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Carpet Dumped on Pavement, 27th April
item.description:
A large length of unwanted carpet has been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you,

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Majendie Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Tabard street, 27th April
item.description:
There are food packaging, plastic bottles, plastic food containers, cans and food waste on the pavement and road on Tabard Street. It has been there two days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tabard Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike in middle of pavement, 27th April
item.description:
Lime bike on middle of pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 170, Lower Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bikes parked outside designated area, 27th April
item.description:
Lime bikes are parked not in their designated area

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mentmore Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped black bags of used clothes, 27th April
item.description:
This bag has now been here for a week.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danecroft Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 1 ton unsecured weight hanging from scaffolding on the road, 27th April
item.description:
1 ton unsecured weight hanging loosely from a rope pulley overnight from scaffolding on 1 Doyce Street. Swaying dangerously in the wind and can drop and cause injuries

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Doyce Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
